name: Team Ross
subject: begging (Obama)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| There is such a thing as too many chances.

Senator Burr has had 20+ years of them in Washington.

In Congress, he's supported measures that would gut Social Security and turn Medicare into a voucher system. He's taken money from companies that ship jobs overseas. And he was _one of just three Senators_ to vote against a ban on insider trading for Members of Congress.

**On top of that, he supports Donald Trump unequivocally.**

Senator Burr stopped listening to North Carolinians a long time ago. He does as he pleases in Washington no matter what the implications are for families here.

Our elected leaders should listen to us. It's their job, and that's what Deborah will do in the Senate. But she won't get there unless we hit all our remaining goals. **That 's why President Obama emailed you earlier today asking you to stand with Deborah.** We CAN'T MISS this one.

_**[Please, give what you can. We're begging. We don't want another six years of Senator Burr. ](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427d2/2cc31c44/5413cc3/19f9a9e5/2917642950/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161024pm3?refcode=dre161024pm3_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")**_

Thank you,

Team Ross |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate

name: Leigh K. Warren, EMILY's List
subject: Fundraising update >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b08/24c69fd9/b423267/18ea3a85/1239595692/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all&source=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

I have some really good news: We're actually ahead of our fundraising projections for October.

But we still need to keep raising money. And here's why:

When it's this late in the game, our candidates and staff that works with them are always asking me if we have more resources. Every debate, poll, and conversation at the doors right now has a huge impact. And more and more money from outside Republican groups keeps pouring in every day.

So our candidates need the resources to prep, research, and pivot -- and to talk to even more voters before they cast their ballots. There isn't a moment to waste -- the money we raise now is going right back out to flip the Senate, unseat House Republicans, and elect Hillary Clinton.

**[Every dollar matters: Donate $3 right now to help elect pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b08/24c69fd9/b423267/18ea3a86/1239595692/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161024_email_RealTalk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Every+dollar+matters+Donate+3+right+now+&utm_campaign=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all&source=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all")**

I've been asking the rest of our team for regular updates on what they think they can raise and if we're trending ahead. Why? Because we'll use every last penny of it.

Our House candidates can use it to hire more staff to knock on more voters' doors. Our Senate candidates can use it to put ads on the air to set the record straight on attacks from the other side. Our gubernatorial candidates can use it to get to those last counties in the state they're hoping to visit again before Election Day.

And Hillary can use it to defeat Donald Trump so soundly that no one who thinks, talks, or behaves like him ever thinks they have a shot at running for office.

**Those are some tall orders, and it's going to be tight all the way to November 8th. That's why I'm asking you to step up today. Donate $3 to help give our candidates the resources they need to win in just 15 days:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Not-a-Moment-to-Waste](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b08/24c69fd9/b423267/18ea3a87/1239595692/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161024_email_RealTalk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNotaMomenttoWast&utm_campaign=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all&source=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all")**

Thank you,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Administrative Officer, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b08/24c69fd9/b423267/18ea3a80/1239595692/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161024_email_RealTalk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all&source=WPEFEV67N_digital_email_20161024_RealTalk_n-all")**

|
---|---|---

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb1c/2a380d31/17a4da8e/ffc551/2809742017/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire is practically guaranteed to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and poll after poll shows that thanks to support from Ayotte's corporate special interest backers, Governor Hassan is locked in a dead heat with Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb1c/2a380d31/17a4da8e/ffc552/2809742017/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI0XzEwMjItRkVDLU1QRy1OTzJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
**Our records indicate that you may be able to help us pull ahead once and for all with a $3 donation. So, I'm asking you directly:[Give $3 or more now so that together we can help Maggie win on Election Day, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb1c/2a380d31/17a4da8e/ffc552/2809742017/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI0XzEwMjItRkVDLU1QRy1OTzJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb1c/2a380d31/17a4da8e/ffc552/2809742017/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI0XzEwMjItRkVDLU1QRy1OTzJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Look, this race is as tight as they come, so we're 100% serious when we tell you that your gift right now could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing the Senate to Washington Republicans. I don't know about you, but I don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done more.
**[Please, donate $3-- every dollar you can.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb1c/2a380d31/17a4da8e/ffc552/2809742017/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI0XzEwMjItRkVDLU1QRy1OTzJfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161024_1022-FEC-MPG-NO2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Marc Goldberg

name: Trey Gowdy
subject: Peter, I need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Trey Gowdy for Congress
body:
Peter, I know you're extremely busy, but I'd really like to hear your thoughts on what issues concern you most. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38342652:W8JMxruNq:m:1:1320601823:7608192B51CA808163FDDAD8BA01A91E:r)
---
Peter, I need your help.

Our team put together a short 1-question survey on what issues matter most to you and your family, [**and I'd like you to give me your input as soon as possible.** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38342652:W8JMxruNq:m:1:1320601823:7608192B51CA808163FDDAD8BA01A91E:r)

This election is so very important, and the choices we make will determine the kind of country we want our children and grandchildren to live in.

| [** Take The Trey Gowdy
Official Survey! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38342652:W8JMxruNq:m:1:1320601823:7608192B51CA808163FDDAD8BA01A91E:r)
---

Peter, this survey will only take a minute of your time. I know you're extremely busy, but I'd really like to hear your thoughts on what issues concern you most.

It's my privilege and honor to serve the great state of South Carolina, and I take my duties seriously -- and part of those duties is to make certain I know the issues important to the people I work for.

That's why it's so important that I hear from you today. [**I hope you will take a moment and let me know what is most important to you.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38342652:W8JMxruNq:m:1:1320601823:7608192B51CA808163FDDAD8BA01A91E:r)

Sincerely,

Trey Gowdy
South Carolina 4th District

[** Take The Trey Gowdy
Official Survey! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38342652:W8JMxruNq:m:1:1320601823:7608192B51CA808163FDDAD8BA01A91E:r)

name: Paul Ryan
subject: 14 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, There are only 14 days until Election Day - but who's counting? I am. I'm counting because we have a lot of work to do in a short amount of time. Here's what we're up against: Nancy Pelosi and her allies currently have a $23 million spending advantage on television advertising alone. House Democrats announced they raised over $20 million in the month of September, double what they raised in July and August combined. To compound the problem, over the past week, we saw an increasingly confident Hillary Clinton begin to direct money to congressional races. Peter, this may seem like too much to overcome -- but I have full confidence in our conservative grassroots base to take this challenge head-on. Don't forget, 14 days may seem like a short time, but in politics that's an eternity. I know it will be difficult -- but I know you're up to the challenge. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38331638:WvVDFrupN:m:3:1155937413:0667F83B3AAAD6555E8159041D01E9D9:r That's why I'm challenging 1,500 conservatives to step up before the final fundraising deadline of this election. If we don't hit our fundraising goals by the end of October, we risk giving Nancy Pelosi and Hillary Clinton unstoppable momentum heading into the final week of the election. Will you answer my call? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s all hands on deck now – help me finish strong and WIN this race. |

Friend, This is it. Today we’re kicking off our critical two-week final push to Election Day. I know you’ve been a staunch supporter of my campaign. But our records show you have not yet contributed financially to help us achieve victory over Crooked Hillary. I’m writing today because I need you on board now more than ever. I’m counting on your help to go big, close strong and WIN, so I can fight for you and Make America Great Again! Please JOIN Team Trump today with a $5, $10, $20, $35 or even $50 EMERGENCY contribution per week, to fund our final ad buys and critical get-out-the-vote efforts in key battlegrounds. CONTRIBUTE $5 PER WEEK = $10 TOTAL CONTRIBUTE $10 PER WEEK = $20 TOTAL CONTRIBUTE $35 PER WEEK = $70 TOTAL CONTRIBUTE $50 PER WEEK = $100 TOTAL CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT
The career politicians, the liberal media, Wall Street banks and the corrupt special interests are all against me – they’re all-in for Crooked Hillary. It proves we’re on the right side in this fight for our nation’s future. I know you agree it’s time to put the American people first. And that’s exactly what I’m going to do when we win. Believe me, we’ve got the establishment elites and their cronies running scared. They’re resorting to every dirty trick you can imagine to stop our movement and put Crooked Hillary in the White House – even resorting to intimidation, vandalism and violence. They’re showing just how desperate they are to maintain a corrupt system. And they’re pouring MASSIVE amounts of money into this race every single day. That’s why getting involved right now is so important – our strength is in numbers, and this is our shot to take back our country. Make your most generous possible contribution today – I greatly appreciate ANY amount of support you're able to provide. With your help I know we will win on November 8th and Make America Great Again! Best wishes, Donald J. name: Ben Carson
subject: Join Me on November 2nd
body:
| My Faith Matters LIVE The Importance of Faith in American Culture & Politics | [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vW2BcAAuNd)
---|---

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38345727:W2BcAAuNd:m:1:876315805:E88BA19A05F5B28024ABC18555529E36:r)

* * *

Dear Peter,

No longer can you and I, as believers, afford to be indifferent or assume that, through the actions of others, our nation will be restored. It's a period in America's history that's now calling for more. It calls for the intentional commitment of all 90 million believers united by the conviction and action of our faith to restore our nation. Our faith matters.

I hope you will join me, along with **Dr. David Jeremiah, Pastor Keith Craft, Pastor J.D. Greear, Reverend Samuel Rodriguez, Megan Alexander of Inside Edition, Pastor Vance Pitman** and **Texas State Representative Scott Turner** as we discuss [the importance of our faith in American culture](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38345727:W2BcAAuNd:m:1:876315805:E88BA19A05F5B28024ABC18555529E36:r)
.

You'll be inspired as we look at how we can apply our faith to our communities and to politics, and do so with both grace and truth, courage and compassion.

And I know you'll enjoy the music of 8-time Dove Award Winner, **Todd Smith of Selah**.

[Join with your church, your small group, or your family](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38345727:W2BcAAuNd:m:1:876315805:E88BA19A05F5B28024ABC18555529E36:r). Don't miss this. You'll be blessed by it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

[My Faith Matters LIVE: The Importance of Faith in America Culture & Politics](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38345727:W2BcAAuNd:m:1:876315805:E88BA19A05F5B28024ABC18555529E36:r)

**Date:** Wednesday, November 2nd
**Time:** 7PM (ET) / 6PM (CT)
**Tape Delayed:** 7PM (MT) / 6PM (PT)

PRESENTED BY MY FAITH VOTES. WHO EXISTS TO INSPIRE AND MOTIVATE JESUS FOLLOWERS TO VOTE

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38345728:W2BcAAuNd:m:1:876315805:E88BA19A05F5B28024ABC18555529E36:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.bencarson.com/p/iW2BcAAuNd). [Update your preferences](http://email.bencarson.com/p/oW2BcAAuNd)

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Hush Money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

The governor paid out $1 M in hush money

Friend,

Just last week we learned Steve
Bullock paid out $900,000 in hush money to state employees.

The Bozeman Chronicle reported
that there were 42 confidential employee settlements - All to
"cover up misdeeds."

One payment tried to silence a
potential whistleblower, and sweep alleged discrimination under
the rug.

Even a lawyer from Steve
Bullock's own party say he likely violated state law.

We can't let Steve Bullock cover
this up too. Pitch in $10, $25, $50 or $100 today to help us keep
this ad on the air.

Thank you,

Greg

Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

name: Maggie for NH
subject: RSVP: Cheer on Maggie at Thursday's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb17/2a380d31/179b371c/ffc549/2688463751/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hey there --
You're one of Governor Hassan's top supporters, so we're hoping that you'll join us this Thursday to cheer her on before her next debate with Senator Ayotte. Help us show that we've got the strongest grassroots support in this race!
**WHEN:** Thursday, October 27; Meet at 4:00 PM
**WHERE:** NH1 News, 4 Church Street
Concord, NH 03301
**[RSVP Here](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb17/2a380d31/179b371c/ffc54a/2688463751/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/nh1-debate-rsvp?&source=20161025_NH1")**
We all know how hard Maggie is working for us, and this race is really getting down to the wire. It's our turn to repay the favor by cheering her on and getting her one step closer to victory in November.
We hope to see you there, and thanks for all you're doing to help elect Maggie to be our next U.S. Senator!
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- If you can't make it in person, be sure to watch the whole debate live on NH1 starting at 8:00 PM. Once again, Maggie will show why she's the best choice to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate. You don't want to miss it!

name: John Kasich
subject: Save the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
The Democrats are just four seats away from winning a majority in
the U.S. Senate, but we can stop them. At least half a dozen
campaigns are too close to call and we need to do all that we can
to win them and hold our majority!

Peter, the Democrats are just
four seats away from winning a majority in the U.S. Senate, but
we can stop them. At least half a dozen campaigns are too close
to call and we need to do all that we can to win them and hold
our majority!

If Hillary becomes president, it
is vital that Republicans keep control of the United States
Senate. Today, we're launching a Save the Senate campaign to
raise the funds to ensure that our Republican team wins.

I've been traveling the country
doing everything I can to make sure down ballot Republicans win,
but now I need your help. As a personal favor to me, please
consider chipping in with $10, $25, $50 or more right now to help
our Republicans get out the vote and win!

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help.

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Trey Nix, Team Cooper
subject: Biden's email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Just making sure you saw this, friend. Vice President Biden knows this election couldn't be more important, and that's why he's getting involved.
Just making sure you saw this, friend. Vice President Biden knows this election couldn't be more important, and that's why he's getting involved.
| Just making sure you saw this, friend. This election couldn't be more important. Vice President Biden knows it, and that's why he's getting involved. **[Chip in now to help Roy across the finish line.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc51/1757581232/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for all your help! Trey \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Joe Biden (info@roycooper.com)
Date: Mon, Oct 24, 2016 at 11:43 AM
Subject: Listen up, friends
---

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc51/1757581232/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
This is important, friends. There is just too much on the line in North Carolina to sit this election out. I know Roy Cooper. He's a good man -- honorable, decent, and tough. The son of a school teacher who worked the family farm, the student educated in North Carolina public schools from grade school through law school. He never forgets where he comes from, and the values of the state that raised him -- never, ever put politics above the best interests of the people. That's Roy. As attorney general of North Carolina, he's taken on big banks, big pharma, payday lenders, and child predators. He's a man of integrity who always does the right thing. And that's the kind of governor this great state deserves. **[Will you chip in right now to make sure Roy wins this thing on Election Day?](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc51/1757581232/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Look, being governor is a tough job. I've worked with a lot of governors on everything from keeping cops on the street and teachers in the classroom to preparing for natural disasters and rebuilding roads and bridges. I've seen governors lead the charge on raising teacher pay and expanding access to health care. And while folks are frustrated by the gridlock in Washington, they are embarrassed by governors who don't represent them. But that's what you have right now in North Carolina -- a current governor that's the face of discriminatory laws that have cost the state thousands of jobs, hundreds of millions of dollars, and untold damage to the state's reputation. Blatant attacks on voting rights that have been struck down in the court of law and ridiculed in the court of public opinion. Friends, governors set the tone in their states. And Roy Cooper will set the tone for your future. It's time for change in North Carolina. It's time to start moving forward again. And that's why I'm supporting my friend, Roy Cooper, a leader who will appeal to our hopes and not our fears. **But he needs your support, too.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc50/1757581232/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc53/1757581232/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc52/1757581232/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [**Other »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a06/2fde7c66/43147569/156acc51/1757581232/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-20161024?utm_campaign=fnd_biden_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_biden_ful_kick__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

If you're feeling fired up and ready to go, chip in today. Roy's counting on all of us, friends.
Your support means a lot to me and it means a lot to Roy. Thanks for stepping up.
Joe

name: Russ Feingold
subject: My vote against the Patriot Act
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Senator Ron Johnson and his allies are still attacking my vote. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4621/1c469400/1826e03/3541a9f/682240263/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-october?utm_source=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&utm_campaign=PA&utm_medium=ema") Friend, On this day 15 years ago, I was the sole member of the United States Senate to vote against the Patriot Act. And, 15 years later, I am _still_ being attacked for my vote. When I cast that vote, only six weeks had passed since the horrendous attacks on 9/11\. Initially, I wanted to vote for an early version of the bill, which I believed protected individuals civil liberties while also updating our laws to account for new technologies. But then, the Bush administration held secret meetings, took shortcuts, and introduced a new version of the Patriot Act that couldn't be changed. This isn't how our democracy should operate: Behind closed doors and without transparency. It was outrageous. The final version of the Patriot Act gave the federal government far too much power to spy on the American people. Congress held its breath and crossed its fingers that this power wouldn't get abused, and the bill was passed. When I voted no, I voted my conscience, and I voted to do right by the people of Wisconsin and the people of America. I voted no because national security and civil liberties should not be mutually exclusive -- and should be beyond partisan politics. Now, 15 years later, Senator Ron Johnson and his allies are _still_ attacking my vote against the Patriot Act. If Senator Johnson and his super PACs were listening to the people of Wisconsin, they would know one thing: their attacks won't work. **There are just over tw o weeks left in this campaign. It's going to take the full force of this grassroots team to combat all these outrageous right-wing attacks and win this race.** [**If you're with me, please consider rushing a $5 grassroots donation to my campaign right now.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4621/1c469400/1826e03/3541a9f/682240263/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-october?utm_source=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&utm_campaign=PA&utm_medium=ema") Thanks for standing with me. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4621/1c469400/1826e03/3541a9f/682240263/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-october?utm_source=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-24_PA_ND&utm_campaign=PA&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jason=20Roe?=
subject: ICYMI: The Case for Bill Bryant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=6aab0cb2e0&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

In case you missed it, SeattlePI did a damn good job outlining why Jay Inslee has been a failed governor and why we need to elect Bill Bryant.

After you read the article (I've included an excerpt below) can you **[make a contribution](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=960ef318af&e=32f1a3df98)** so we can get this in front of as many voters as possible? _The case for Bryant: The Washington economy is recovering nicely from the Great Recession, but state government is fumbling its responsibilities. The Governor is engaged on climate change, but disengaged from running his state._

_If Washington is doing so well, why is the state in contempt of court for failing to obey a state Supreme Court order to fully fund K-12 education? The $5 billion increase in education spending does not hide a basic fact: Inslee pledged a solution in 2012. He has not delivered._

_Why is Washington under a federal court injunction to repair culverts that are blocking salmon migration? Why has salmon recovery faltered under America's most "green" governor?_

_Why has a federal judge held the state Department of Social and Health Services in contempt for warehousing mentally ill defendants in jail for weeks and months before they receive competency evaluations or treatment. Judge Marsha Pechman ordered sanctions after the state failed to heed her order to fix its state hospitals._

_Gov. Inslee is a professional politician from the top of his head to the tips of his toes. He is intently focused on one issue, reducing carbon emissions into the atmosphere._

_He is great at grandstanding, showing up with furrowed brow at the scene of disasters, but far less skilled at the close-quarters work of hammering out solutions._

_Bryant is a successful businessman, a specialist in agricultural exports, who served two terms on the Seattle Port Commission. It was his election, and that of Gael Tarleton (now in the Legislature) that brought business competence into a position to curb port's "crony capitalism" and make it greener._ You can read the full article [here](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=c18e5c766c&e=32f1a3df98).

**Jason Roe**
Senior Advisor
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

---

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: safety and security
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8698264928609370112/-8704305791521259520?refcode=e20161025.2&refcode2=e20161025.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friends --

The Senate floor isn't for the faint of heart. The 100 men and women who stand there are responsible for our safety and security. They can't bully or buy their way forward -- they have to lead our nation with diplomacy, compassion, and understanding.

It's a tall order, but that's exactly why we need to elect more strong, principled women to get things done. I worked in Washington for a long time, and as the first woman to serve as Secretary of State, you can trust I know a thing or two about breaking glass ceilings.

**Friends, now we have a chance to smash through another glass ceiling by electing Katie McGinty as Pennsylvania 's first woman senator. I know she has the vision, the strength, and the grit to stand firm in the Senate for Pennsylvanians and Americans.**

**But Katie is in a tough -- incredibly tight -- race today, and she urgently needs our help to win. [Can you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to help Katie become Pennsylvania's first woman senator? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8698264928609370112/-8704305791521259520?refcode=e20161025.2&refcode2=e20161025.2nd&amount=25)**

**[Donate Now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8698264928609370112/-8704305791521259520?refcode=e20161025.2&refcode2=e20161025.2nd&amount=25)**
Frankly, Pat Toomey has shown that he's not fit for the job: He's blocked the nomination vote to fill the next Supreme Court vacancy, flip-flopped on vital trade policies, and rejected equal pay for women. He's consistently put special interests before the needs of working families.

There are just 14 days until the election, and nearly every poll shows Katie is virtually tied with Senator Toomey. Pennsylvanians deserve a champion who will stand up for them and keep them safe, and the choice is clear: We need my friend Katie McGinty for U.S Senate.

**Join me in supporting Katie. Donate $5 now:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8698264928609370112/-8704305791521259520?refcode=e20161025.2&refcode2=e20161025.2nd&amount=25)

Thank you --

Madeleine Albright
Former Secretary of State

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 14 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8698264928609370112/-8704305791521259520?refcode=e20161025.2&refcode2=e20161025.2nd&amount=25)**
---

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

clean_body: Your urgent financial help is critical to keep the Trump for President Ad campaign on TV’s everywhere. | This is our last chance, Friend, Right now, Trump for President is airing hard-hitting, issues-based TV ads in key media markets, promoting Mr. Trump’s plans to Make America Great Again while exposing the lobbyists, Crooked Hillary and all the other politicians who’ve made the system work only for them and against you. The American people are starving for this kind of message, and if enough people hear directly from Mr. Trump about his plans for the future, we’re going to win on November 8. Please make a contribution of $35, $50 or $100 to keep Mr. Trump’s ads on the air all the way through Election Day. CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT After three debates, the people can see that Crooked Hillary has no accomplishments after 30 years as a politician, no ability to bring real change to D.C., and no excuses for why she promised a group of bankers that she supports “open borders.” It’s time for Mr. Trump to “close the deal” with the voters, and to do that he needs YOUR immediate financial contribution, Friend. You’ve supported our movement as a loyal patriot, and we are calling for your help again ASAP. Soon it will be too late. Please donate $35, $50 or $100 to fund the final TV ad blitz that will put Mr. Trump over the top on November 8th. Thank you, Brad Parscale Digital Director Trump For President FUND THE FINAL TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT AD BLITZ Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Dear Peter, The length the establishment is going through to stop our momentum is tremendous. Last week, you heard about the attempted bribe I was offered to drop out of the race. I also told you about the big money coming from the Common Core lobby to prop up my opponent. They're trying to stop us in the same way they have tried to stop Trump from making America great again--by making backroom deals and undercutting our campaign. **We have to end this.** We need to stop the establishment and election-buying interest groups. No other candidate running to represent Louisiana has a lifelong record of serving our Constitution. It is now up to you to determine whether the establishment wins again, or we change Louisiana politics for good.

**_[I need you to get out there and vote early against the establishment before the clock on early voting runs out.](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=9hrmpjxyTNe6qdc421AAa-2BmMspBile-2F24pdw3WI7-2Fr3jkPEVEiKJg0B9YFbwKrD8_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxmIlf5zj960ugSkmVt9q8ByO-2FgM3-2BEmmYIHcZYkko9i-2F-2F4tZmHhT6toEUQ-2Bu50qJ6f7QMKwtVrUVdYT6teJtAxgG0SqwReAyUH7QFNSmVwycCp3O0eTROEfDir2qL3OKsWVLUFxlLeLy5QoX6gySglD-2Bd4II3-2BkzEdFtJpL26TINmLDNnB9akDSQTT6S2Mh2Wvij6qsQjeGAuEUGOog8u9TNk8NWzYCqoiT9veDwKzEU1QeCp8ae4oc8lc4v0UZ3gD99WAUcDZiIlVwO0wOohGP2ZNNa1Dj3FefLlmC8owqqcPoPanO8rOgpPTIcmVr-2FME-3D)_ You can also visit our elections page to find your local early voting location. ** _[**Want to do even more to help? name: Peter Hanscom
subject: Will it be enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505aa/7be36b49/1e7e979d/78f9ceb0/3752318397/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
I've got news for you, friend: **The final push of this entire campaign starts today.**

Today, we're two weeks out from Election Day. That means we're rushing to get staff and volunteers in place in every one of Indiana's 92 counties, so they can do the final door knocking, phone calling, and Get Out The Vote-ing we need to finish this campaign strong.

**Will it be enough? Well, that depends on the help we get from grassroots supporters like you.** This isn't one of those races where the outcome is already decided. Every canvasser, every phone-banker, and every volunteer will make a difference -- **and so will every dollar.**

**[Friend, will you pitch in $5 to our Two Weeks Out Campaign to make our final push the strongest it can be?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505aa/7be36b49/1e7e979d/78f9ceb7/3752318397/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalpush?refcode=20161025.1nd&amount=10")** | **Goal: $10,000
Deadline: TONIGHT, 10/25**
---
A lot is riding on this election. What kind of leadership do we want for Indiana, and the country? What kind of future?

Let's not leave anything up to chance. **Let 's do everything we can to elect Evan Bayh, the right choice for Indiana.**

**[Please pitch in $5 to our Two Weeks Out Campaign before midnight.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505aa/7be36b49/1e7e979d/78f9ceb7/3752318397/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalpush?refcode=20161025.1nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Peter Hanscom
Indiana Democratic Party Coordinated Campaign Director
** **

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Our last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

Fellow Conservative,

The fundraising reports were just released -- and it doesn't look good for us.

Nancy Pelosi has amassed **$144.9 million** from the radical left to give Hillary Clinton a House obedient to her whims.

On top of everything else, last week **we learned that Hillary Clinton is doubling down on Pelosi's takeover strategy by shifting focus from her presidential race to congressional races.**

You and I have one last shot to ensure the last line of defense for conservative values doesn't fall into the clutches of Hillary -- **[and it starts at the last deadline of the election.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

**This FINAL deadline is our very last chance to stop Pelosi and Hillary.**
Please stand with me and the entire Republican Party to preserve the historic majority you built.

There are now **_only 14 days left_** in this election -- not much time left to fight back against the Democrats. That means every second counts.

**I am counting on you to take a stand today and protect our Republican House.**

**MAKE AN INSTANT CONTRIBUTION TO PROTECT THE HOUSE:**

**[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

**[Pitch in $50 IMMEDIATELY>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

**[Pitch in $75 IMMEDIATELY>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

**[Pitch in $250 IMMEDIATELY>>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

**Or pitch in another amount via this secure link:
[https://contribute.nrcc.org/defeat-liberals/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**
Don't let the Democrats destroy everything we built.

Thanks,

Newt Gingrich

**_P.S._** The last deadline of the election is this Monday. This is an ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK moment.

**That's why -- until midnight tonight -- I will personally TRIPLE-MATCH any contributions you make to protect the House.**

Just use this secure link to make 4x the impact on this election today: **[https://contribute.nrcc.org/defeat-liberals/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/38350784:suz5MAuNF:m:1:1405944196:DD3BB6B73C8EEAD104554D83041DCCB1:r)**

body:

| Did you see the new poll, team? Patrick is surging -- we've erased Rubio's lead! This race is in a dead heat -- and with only 14 days left, now's the time to capitalize. [**Can you chip in right now?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e49/738133e4/32408a7c/7f859dfe/2693990513/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161025?refcode=pme161025_m&recurring=true&amount=10") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e49/738133e4/32408a7c/7f859dfe/2693990513/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161025?refcode=pme161025_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

This isn't just one awesome poll -- it's part of a larger trend. The _New York Times_ just endorsed our campaign AND President Obama took Marco Rubio to task for his absenteeism.

**But here 's the bad news: we're being outspent 3 to 1!** Rubio's special interest allies are blanketing the airwaves with their lying attacks -- and we're afraid it might be enough to drown us out. [**Contribute to stop Rubio, turn Florida blue, and retake the Senate >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e49/738133e4/32408a7c/7f859dfe/2693990513/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161025?refcode=pme161025_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

body:
Proud to have President Obama standing with me. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1MDM4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTk1MzQ4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, We have a new television ad up and running -- and it's one I'm particularly proud to share with you. **I 'm honored to have President Obama's support. He is an outstanding role model -- for our kids, for the kind of leadership we should aspire toward.** **You can watch the President 's endorsement here:** [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1MDM4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTk1MzQ4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [**Please take a moment to watch the President 's message and then help us keep it on air!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1MDM4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTk1MzQ4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) From rebuilding our economy, expanding health care, protecting the rights of women, fighting for equal rights for the LGBTQ community, preserving our environment, promoting common sense gun safety regulations, and protecting civil rights (I could go on and on and on), President Obama has led America with remarkable dignity, passion, and vision. Here in Washington, President Obama has supported our vision for a stronger economy for working families, and for a clean energy future. He and I know that to fulfill our progressive vision we need to win this November -- not just Hillary's race and my race, but the state legislature and initiatives, like raising the minimum wage and ensuring paid sick leave, up and down the ballot. **That 's why I'm proud to have the President's endorsement -- and his friendship.** [**Friend, thank you for helping us get this ad out across the state. I know it will make a difference.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1MDM4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTk1MzQ4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc1MDM4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTk1MzQ4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Scott For Vermont 2016**
body:
|

| |
---

---|---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
**October 25, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Phil Scott: Department of Vermont Health Access Audit Shows the Need to Modernize State Government**
_Phil Scott is the only candidate in this election with a government modernization plan to improve the accountability of public investments_
**Montpelier, Vt. —** Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today issued the following statement on the report that the Department of Vermont Health Access (DVHA) has spent millions in taxpayer dollars without clearly defined metrics:

“The revelations that the Department of Vermont Health Access has spent upwards of $38 million to electronically input medical records and create an online depository through Vermont Information Technology Leaders (VITL) without appropriate oversight or the ability to measure outcomes or impact, is another example of this administration poorly managing taxpayer dollars and a perfect example of why we need to modernize state government’s systems and approach to project management.

“I was very disappointed to learn that the state has not monitored how well the system was actually working, and that no clear project goals or standards were set. It’s apparent that the state cannot determine the progress of this program, and it is very frustrating that the Governor and his appointees have not taken full responsibility for failing to properly oversee this project. It’s very difficult to change the culture of an organization if no one is held accountable.

“As Governor, I will implement my Government Modernization Plan to address this exact sort of inefficiency and mismanagement of taxpayer money. Key to this plan is implementation of proven management protocols to better administer projects on behalf of taxpayers, and setting clear, measurable goals for projects that are tied to outcomes and can be used in a results-based budgeting process. We will create a Government Modernization & Efficiency Team to audit all agencies and departments within state government in order to streamline services, eliminate waste and ensure oversight and proper management.

“While this example of poor financial stewardship is small compared to similar mishandled programs on the part of state government, such as Vermont Health Connect, it illustrates why so many Vermonters have lost faith and trust in their state government.

“Vermonters deserve better. They deserve a state government that uses proven management strategies to oversee programs and measure success. They deserve a state government that is a good steward of their resources. As Governor, my administration will implement these procedures, and restore much-needed faith and trust in state government.”

View Phil’s full Government Modernization Plan [here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dd2b38b65d&e=19cebfe173) or go to [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8bce56f79c&e=19cebfe173). Vermonters can also read more about the audit at [www.vtdigger.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e454c0b167&e=19cebfe173) and from a Caledonian Record editorial, “More Millions Squandered,” at [www.caledonianrecord.com](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2faaf585e9&e=19cebfe173).

###

subject: RE: Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 14 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 14 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 14 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

Tim Henderson Campaign Manager Gregg for Governor | = Paid for by Gregg for Indiana Gregg for Indiana PO Box 44224 Indianapolis IN 46244 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Greetings,
---
| Good news! WCAX released a poll last night and it has us up 7 points! But that's not to be taken lightly. My opponent has been stumping with Sen. Sanders, Sen. Leahy and Vice-President Biden among others. We imagine this poll will further encourage them to get involved. We've also just learned Bernie sent out a fundraising email for Sue Minter and we expect it to have a huge impact on her fundraising efforts!

That is why I need your help!

There are 14 days left and we need more resources to fight back against the deceitful ads and attacks coming from out of state special interests.

[Can you please donate $50, $100, $250 or even $500 today?](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1500831caf&e=19cebfe173)

We cannot afford another 4-8 years of the same failed policies and one-party rule. I will bring balance and common sense leadership to the Governor's office.

Let's do this!

Phil
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3cdff4ade5&e=19cebfe173 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE TODAY!")

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Mike Weinholtz for Governor Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/6794473878539406080)
---
**_MIKE WEINHOLTZ FOR GOVERNOR NEWSLETTER_** _Haz click_[ _aqu i _](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/6866531472577334016)_para leerlo en espa ñol!_ **_MESSAGE FROM MIKE_** When I won the nomination for Democratic candidate for governor in April, I disclosed publicly that my wife was under investigation for medical cannabis. I made that decision because I believe deeply in transparency (and wish more elected officials in Utah did, too!) Out of respect for the legal process and the investigation, I declined to speak to the press about my wife's situation or take a position on medical cannabis. But last week her case was resolved, and in that same spirit of transparency I called a press conference to address everything proactively. **[Check out the video here:](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/6938589066615261952)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7010646660653189888) Did you know that 24 Utahns die a month from opioids? Or that since Governor Herbert took office in 2010, opioid abuse has increased over 25%? This is a crisis, but when suffering Utahns needed him most, our governor has done nothing. To challenge Utah's opioid crisis, I fully support legalization of medical cannabis. This isn't about me or my wife. This is about doing the right thing, medically, morally, and philosophically. It's time to do the right thing! Together with you, Mike
* * *
**_ONLY TWO WEEKS LEFT!_** Elections are just TWO WEEKS from today-- it's time to Get Out the Vote in Utah! Time is running out, but you can still: - [**Donate!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7082704254691117824) - [**Volunteer!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7154761848729045760) - [**Register to vote!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7226819442766973696)** _**You can register online until November 1st, or you can do it in person at the polls on Nov. 8th._
* * *
**_NEW VIDEO: GARY HERBERT DOESN 'T STAND UP FOR WOMEN_** Despite all the terrible things Donald Trump has said and done to women, Gary Herbert didn't care enough to stand up to him. The women of Utah deserve better! **[Check out our new video:](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7298877036804901632?v=WBgmZnay9cQ)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7370934630842829568?v=WBgmZnay9cQ) If you agree that the women of Utah deserve better, [**VOLUNTEER TODAY**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7154761848729045760) and help us elect a governor who will stand up for women!
* * *
**_GLORIA STEINEM IN UTAH!_** Last week we had the incredible privilege of hosting feminist icon Gloria Steinem at our campaign headquarters for a Get-Out-the-Vote rally! It was an honor to spend time around this legendary writer and activist, but her visit was also another sign that Utah has become a political battleground state! Gloria reminded all of us that we have a job to do-- and said she hopes to come back to Utah for a "victory party!"
* * *
**_WATCH PARTY WITH SENATOR UDALL!_** We hosted a watch party for the third presidential debate at our campaign headquarters, and were joined by a special visitor: the amazing Senator Tom Udall of New Mexico! We had a full house of proud Utah Democrats together to cheer on Secretary Clinton-- and of course, laugh at the comedy show that is Donald Trump trying to debate policy. Senator Udall's visit was just one more sign that all over the country eyes are turning to Utah. [**VOLUNTEER NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7154761848729045760) to help us turn Utah blue and give everyone an election year they WON'T forget!
* * *
**_My campaign isn 't taking any corporate money, which means that the only way we can win is through support from individuals like you!_** **_Click_**[** _here_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/7082704254691117824)** _to contribute now!_**
---

Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---

Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1523802180270885632/6722416284501478144).

---
| _**Florida: "a winnable race for the Dems" \-- Rachel Maddow, MSNBC**_ Did you see Rachel Maddow's segment on our race last night, team? She gave an awesome update on where we stand: _" polls have definitely tightened" _and **Marco Rubio is _"beatable in Florida in a race which could determine Senate control"!_** [**Can you chip in right now to help us take the lead and turn the Senate blue?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e44/738133e4/3244dd72/7f859ea7/2378804225/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161025pm?refcode=pme161025pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

She pointed out that Patrick got the _" endorsement of Marco Rubio's hometown paper, the Miami Herald... In fact Patrick Murphy has now been endorsed by all **four** of Florida's largest newspapers, three of which backed Marco Rubio when he first ran for the Senate!"_

But Rachel also reminded viewers of a major caveat: advertising in Florida is really, really expensive. She spelled out the ONE thing missing here: more money to fund our TV advertisements and reach more voters. **We've been outspent 4-1 since the primary ... **with just two weeks to go, we can't finish strong unless as many people as possible chip in right now!

**Contribute before our Debate Deadline tomorrow at midnight to beat Marco Rubio:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e44/738133e4/3244dd72/7f859ea0/2378804225/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161025pm?refcode=pme161025pm_m&express_lane=true&amount=3")

name: Jordan, Campaign Manager
subject: I can’t believe this moment is here
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)
---
Wow --

TWO WEEKS. I can't believe this moment is here! Just 14 days left to finalize our GOTV plans, kick our voter outreach into overdrive, and make sure our TV, radio, and web ads are ready to deploy.

[**That 's why it's so critical we reach our $25,000 goal. We're 90% of the way there -- but there are only a few hours until midnight. Can you pitch in $5 or more to push us over the top?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)
---

Look, YOU turned this race into a toss up. We came into this race as underdogs, but it was your grassroots support that helped turn this race into a __dead heat__ against Toomey's big-money political machine.

But we're not there yet, and everybody from Mitch McConnell to Ted Cruz is jumping in to prop up Toomey's campaign. What we do in the next 14 days to respond will win or lose this race for working families.

[**Quick, we 've nearly reached our $25,000 goal, but there isn't much time left. Can you pitch in $5 or more before midnight? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/response-fund**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Jordan

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 14 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/2235076387855663104/-1065637873547476992?refcode=e20161025.3&refcode2=e20161025.3nd&amount=25)**
---

name: David Turner, ChrisKoster.com
subject: "making my head hurt"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7195456549429839872/-8320257874185549824?utm_campaign=fnd_pregn1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pregn1_ndn__dt)

Hey,

This weekend, _The St. Louis Post-Dispatch_ endorsed Chris Koster for Missouri Governor. In their endorsement, they cited Chris' decades of experience, proven record of bipartisan leadership, and readiness to tackle Missouri's tough problems.

As a contrast, the Editorial Board described Eric Greitens as impatient and said he claimed simple questions about solutions to the issues critical to Missouri's future -- like balancing the state budget and keeping our kids safe -- were **" making my head hurt."**

You can't make this up.

This is the choice Missourians must make in two weeks. Do we want a governor with zero experience who would rather blow things up than bring people together to solve problems? Or do we want a governor with a proven track record of results who will work relentlessly to improve the lives of our families and move Missouri forward?

Our last major fundraising deadline is just a few days away and we need to raise an additional $25,000 from grassroots donors like you to get our message out before Election Day.

**If you haven 't made a contribution yet, time is running out. Chip in your first donation of $10 or more today to show Chris you've got his back for the final two weeks of the campaign.**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Donate $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/7195456549429839872/-8320257874185549824?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pregn1_ndn__dt_50)

[Donate $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/7195456549429839872/-8320257874185549824?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pregn1_ndn__dt_25)

[Donate $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/7195456549429839872/-8320257874185549824?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pregn1_ndn__dt_10)

[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/7195456549429839872/-8320257874185549824?refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pregn1_ndn__dt_other)

Together, we can elect a governor who is ready to lead on day one.

Thank you for your support,

David Turner

name: Team Ross
subject: New York Times: 6 races that matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| The _New York Times_ just ran a story about six senate races whose outcomes will determine which party takes control of the Senate.

**Of course, ours was on the list.**

Deborah has erased Senator Burr's lead. She has momentum and the support of President Obama and Democrats everywhere.

[_**She just needs your grassroots support. These last 14 days matter more than any in the campaign. Help us fight back against negative attacks. Chip in $5 toward our October goal.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427d7/2cc31c44/5486baa/19f9aec3/1858494331/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161025pm2?refcode=dre161025pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Washington Republicans and special interest groups are trying as hard as they can to infuse Senator Burr's campaign with energy.

They are spending millions of dollars to remind voters of who he is while simultaneously spreading distortions and lies about Deborah.

**As the _National Journal_ said, we've been able to respond to Senator Burr's attacks throughout the entirety of this campaign. We can't stop now. We're on the verge of flipping this seat and taking back the Senate.**

[_**Be a part of it. Contribute $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427d7/2cc31c44/5486baa/19f9aec3/1858494331/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161025pm2?refcode=dre161025pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

[Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY4ODQ4MTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTA0NDkyNzQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

body:
The final debate is over, and I'm fired up. If you are too, will you help make the final days of this campaign count?

---
Peter, I just walked off the stage in Evansville -- and I am fired up! Tonight's final debate made the choice clearer than ever: Someone who will move Indiana forward, or a rubber stamp on the divisive agenda of the last four years. **If you 're fired up like me and want to move Indiana forward, this is crunch time. Will you chip in now?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-854726684983293952/-6446760429199423488?utm_campaign=fnd_pstdb8_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pstdb8_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)

---

Time after time, my opponent has stuck by the partisan agenda that has taken our state backwards -- and he did it again tonight.
Maybe that's because the DC insiders at the Republican Governors Association have donated $5 million -- a majority of the money funding Holcomb's campaign -- to buy this race.
But I'm fueling this campaign with people power so I can work for Hoosiers like you. That means I need your help to fund our GOTV plan.
**[If you're as fired up as I am, chip in $5 to help me reach our $30,000 goal and get out the vote. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-854726684983293952/-6446760429199423488?utm_campaign=fnd_pstdb8_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161025_fnd_gq_pstdb8_ful__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&amount=5)**
Thanks for your support. It means so much to know you're standing with me.
John

This election ain't over yet, Friend:
1\. **The Kochs and Sheldon Adelson are emptying their war chests to save Mitch McConnell 's majority** \-- just as polls tighten in New Hampshire (TIED), Pennsylvania (R+3), Missouri (TIED), and North Carolina (R+1).

"https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fieldgoals-dscc?refcode=DPE-20161025-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5"),** this dark money flood could CRUSH our shot at victory!

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fieldgoals-dscc?refcode=DPE-20161025-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The battle for Senate control couldn't be closer. **And if right-wing special interests get their way, we 'll face another DECADE of Mitch McConnell's majority!**

[**Friend, no Democrat can sit on the sidelines with our races tightening in the most critical stretch. Please pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift right now >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fieldgoals-dscc?refcode=DPE-20161025-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ea21/2b07114c/4a7fb2f3/73a87fd1/1029060869/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: Two Weeks Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
We need to make sure people go to the polls to have their voices heard during the week of Early Voting, which starts this Thursday, and on Election Day, November 8th. |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b680/3144904511/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1") Friend,

There is one fact about voting that proves true each and every election year: if someone makes a commitment to vote that person is more likely to make it to the polls.

Today, our campaign for U.S. Senate is officially **TWO WEEKS** away from Election Day. We couldn't be prouder of the work we've already achieved together, but we need to know that you're ready for our final hurdle - the voting booth.

Friend, the best way to ensure that you cast your ballot is to commit to a plan now.

**Are you planning to:** [Vote Early](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b681/3144904511/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Vote+Early&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1")
[Vote On Election Day](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b69e/3144904511/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/Voting-Plan-General-Election?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Vote+On+Election+Day&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1")
[Volunteer On Election Day](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b69f/3144904511/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/volunteer-for-chris?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Volunteer+On+Election+Day&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1") With twenty percent of Marylanders undecided in this race, we need everyone to vote if we're going to finish strong and send Chris Van Hollen to the Senate to work for us!

Thank you for everything,

Team Van Hollen [ Chip in $25 Now](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b69c/3144904511/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em102516_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+FIRSTNAME+Chip+in+25+Now&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1")
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a95/70cdc2ba/47283165/397b69d/3144904511/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em102516_1&source=em102516_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. clean_body: We need to make sure people go to the polls to have their voices heard during the week of Early Voting, which starts this Thursday, and on Election Day, November 8th. | "" Friend, There is one fact about voting that proves true each and every election year: if someone makes a commitment to vote that person is more likely to make it to the polls. Today, our campaign for U.S. Senate is officially TWO WEEKS away from Election Day. We couldn't be prouder of the work we've already achieved together, but we need to know that you're ready for our final hurdle - the voting booth. Friend, the best way to ensure that you cast your ballot is to commit to a plan now. Are you planning to: "" "" "" With twenty percent of Marylanders undecided in this race, we need everyone to vote if we're going to finish strong and send Chris Van Hollen to the Senate to work for us! Thank you for everything, Team Van Hollen "" Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Final boost needed >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bf0/24c69fd9/b3cfe82/18ea2f67/2513293014/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV71N_digital_email_20161025_2weeks_n-all&source=WPEFEV71N_digital_email_20161025_2weeks_n-all")

| | Hi there,

We're heading into the most important two weeks of the election.

We've been doing amazing work over the past two years, but it's time to double down. If our candidates can't sprint through November 8th, everything we did to lay the groundwork is lost.

Our Senate candidates in New Hampshire, Nevada, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania are TIED in the polls, and we can't flip the Senate without them. We have 21 women running to flip House seats, and many of their races are going to come down to the wire. And Hillary needs every last one of us to do our part if she's going to defeat Donald Trump to become our first woman president.

These campaigns have done everything they can to set themselves up for victory. But now, their races will all come down to one thing: Turnout.

This community is an energizing force for our candidates, and they need our help now more than ever.

**Donate $3 to give our candidates a final boost so they can get their voters to the polls and flip the Senate, beat House Republicans, and get to the White House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Not-a-Moment-to-Waste](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bf0/24c69fd9/b3cfe82/18ea2f60/2513293014/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161024_email_RealTalk?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgNotaMomenttoWast&utm_campaign=WPEFEV71N_digital_email_20161025_2weeks_n-all&source=WPEFEV71N_digital_email_20161025_2weeks_n-all")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Tracy Newman
subject: We’re TWO WEEKS away…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Can you support our ground game? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Two weeks from today, Election 2016 will be over. [**So, I 'm coming to you now to ask for $5 -- here's why:**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0) I'm hoping to celebrate this November 8th, but I know there's still a lot at play between now and Election Day. In 2012, over 50,000 Washingtonians voted for president but not for governor, and even more left the rest of their ballot blank. We can't have that. There's so much we could be celebrating. **UNLESS DEMOCRATS DON 'T VOTE. UNLESS THEY LEAVE TOO MUCH OF THEIR BALLOT BLANK.** It's the "unless" that has me worried. You see, I've seen it before. Democrats think an election is all over bar the shouting and celebrating -- and they don't vote. **And that 's disastrous.** We need to work over the next two weeks to make sure Democrats fill out their ballots -- and then return them. We can't let up. Jay needs your vote. **That 's why I'm reaching out to you with a personal ask -- rush a donation to help fund our $25,000 Ballot Completion Project:** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&rt=0)

**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=OTc1NjE4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAyMjAwMDIxNwS2&rt=0)**
Your immediate help means we can continue strengthening our Get Out the Vote efforts statewide to mobilize support for Governor Inslee.
**We can win on Novemb er 8th if we all step up now.**
Tracy Newman
Finance Director

body:
