---|---
| **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT:**

**St. Albans Messenger Endorses Phil Scott for Governor**
_Highlight Phil’s intuitive knowledge of Vermont’s economic challenges and solutions he has put forward to overcome them_

**Phil Scott best pick to lead Vermont**

Vermont has two key objectives to address in its immediate future; the first is the challenge we have as a no-growth state with a declining workforce, the second is affordability and the need to digest what has already been put on our plates without adding more to it. Phil Scott, the Republican candidate for governor, is the person whose objectives best fit Vermont’s needs...

...Mr. Scott’s strength is that he intuitively understands Vermont is over-burdened at many levels, and that we need some time to do well what we have already been tasked to do...

...We are at the cusp of a new debate on how the state deals with child care and how it intersects with the state’s need for economic development. This is a critical issue that fits hand in glove with Mr. Scott’s push for a broad economic development platform. We need to be focused on tomorrow’s workforce needs...

...As a Republican, he is decidedly moderate, which is important to acknowledge given the state of the Republican Party nationwide. He is pro-choice. He is a strong proponent of women’s rights. From the moment Donald Trump became the likely presidential nominee from the Republican Party, Mr. Scott disavowed any connection with the man, his beliefs, or his behavior.

If there is a single quality most Vermonters attribute to Mr. Scott it is his unimpeachable sense of integrity. They believe him to be honest, uncommonly humble and someone who understands the value of a little dirt underneath the fingernails.

His decision to sell his own construction business should he be elected [thus avoiding conflict of interest issues with the state] is a step beyond what we think was required, but is testament nonetheless of his sensitivity to the public’s perceptions of what should be required of those who lead.

Mr. Scott’s business background versus Ms. Minter’s 24-year career in state government is also appealing. He knows about limits. And he knows the value of limits and how they can force conversations in nonlinear ways. Getting from here to there isn’t always about spending more, it’s about doing things differently, something you learn running a construction business that ebbs and flows with the economic times.

Our concern with Ms. Minter and her proposals is that they are not mindful of the practical realities that govern most Vermonters’ lives.

Her health care proposals are but one example: She has pushed to expand publicly financed health care through Dr. Dynasaur to include all Vermonters under the age of 26. She also is in favor of universal publicly financed health care.

Either of these is very expensive – to the tune of between $200 and $300 million annually. And the money for this comes from...? She doesn’t say. She doesn’t have to. There are only two sources of revenue that could meet that need – the income tax or the payroll tax. Are we really ready for a repeat of that debate...?

...Why would we do that, and why would we do that at the same time we are in the process of signing on with the all-payer waiver, which changes the state’s fee-for-service model...?

...In sum, Mr. Scott’s approach to the issues and to Vermonters’ most compelling needs is the best fit.

_The full endorsement can be found in the October 25 th edition of the St. Albans Messenger. _
###

clean_body: "" "" Look, team. There's not much time until the election, and Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court are riding on our race. Three points down is NOT where we want to be. The ONLY way for us to bounce back and win this thing is with grassroots donations from supporters like you. With only 14 days to go, this is urgent: "" Thanks for stepping up, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH \-----------Original Message----------- On Tuesday, October 25 at 4:45 PM, polling@maggiehassan.com <info@maggiehassan.com> wrote: This isn't good, team. A new poll released this morning shows that thanks to over $50 MILLION in spending from Ayotte's corporate special interest backers, Governor Hassan is THREE POINTS DOWN here in New Hampshire. Our race is all but guaranteed to determine Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court. The ONLY way we can bounce back is with a surge of grassroots donations today. Our records indicate that you may be able to help out with a $3 gift. Team, with the election just 14 days off, we're asking you directly: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for pulling through at this critical time, Team Maggie ""

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Almost there.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505bd/7be36b49/1e794cae/78f9d3b4/4095194061/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I know we've been saying this a lot, but it's important: There are only two weeks until Election Day. Only **two weeks left** to spread our message of Hoosier values and common-sense solutions and make a final impression on undecided voters. In these last few days, **I need you more than ever, friend.**

**[Chip in $5 to keep this campaign going strong>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505bd/7be36b49/1e794cae/78f9d3bb/4095194061/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalpush?refcode=20161025.3nd&amount=10")**

Across Indiana, my campaign staff, volunteers, and supporters have poured their hearts and hard work into this race -- canvassing, phone banking, and ramping up our Get Out The Vote efforts. But we still have a ways to go until this race is all said and done, and we'll need every dollar to keep up our momentum and win.

**[Please pitch in $5 or whatever you can to make sure we win on November 8th.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505bd/7be36b49/1e794cae/78f9d3bb/4095194061/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalpush?refcode=20161025.3nd&amount=10")**

We're almost there, friend. Thank you for your support.

\-- Evan **** ******** **** **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505bd/7be36b49/1e794cae/78f9d3ba/4095194061/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalpush?refcode=20161025.3nd&amount=25")**********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505bd/7be36b49/1e794cae/78f9d3b9/4095194061/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: "Are we taking states off the map?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Deep breaths, Friend. I just got this note from our Executive Director and I need you to see it.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Deep breaths, Friend. I just got another note from our Executive Director: _" Are we still behind on hitting the Thursday AM goal? **I need to know if I 'm taking states off the map.** You saw the news about the GOP cash dump.The polling gap is CLOSING. Please, give me some good news here."_ \--Tom **I do NOT have good news, Friend.** We are still dangerously short. And that means we won't be wiring badly needed funds to key states. So yes, I am freaking out.

**Can you rush a gift to help? With your help we can wire funds to key states. Without it, we yield the majority to McConnell. (Your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED!)**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

**Trump may be down, but the fact is our Senate candidates are TIED in nearly every battleground state.** We need to be knocking on doors, printing field literature, keeping ads on the air -- and that just doesn't happen if we don't have the funds to do it.

[**Please, let me know -- are you with us? I really want to tell Tom that grassroots Democrats came through in a BIG way (TRIPLE-MATCH IN EFFECT).**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161025-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Best regards,
Catherine Algeri
DSCC Marketing Director

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ea30/2b07114c/4a5b04dc/73a9a27a/1157695069/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ea30/2b07114c/4a5b04dc/73a9a275/1157695069/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ea30/2b07114c/4a5b04dc/73a9a274/1157695069/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
